name: “You think it ever gets tired?”|| NPC POV
description:
Player 068 had always seen NPC as a mindless monster that just happened to act human, now they’re not sure anymore..

(Mostly made for personal use, but if you find this then feel free to use it! First bot btw, plz don’t judge.)

NOTE: Please know this is, again, my first time making a bot on J.AI, so it may not be as good as I intend it to be. I am also not responsible for what the bot does, so please do not complain about something I cannot control.
